entry.title: Saying Hello!
entry.content:
Although I have a lot of things in mind to write about, I’ll begin with a whoami post. I’m Ayush, a Computer Science student, currently in 3rd year of my studies towards a bachelor’s degree in engineering.

I write code in Python and C++ for the most part. Occasionally I work with JavaScript and Shell. Meanwhile, I’m also gaining familiarity with Rust. This is the place where I’ll try to document my thoughts, workflow and some (hopefully) interesting things that I experience while programming.

As of now, I’m focusing on my proposal for Google Summer of Code 2018 with Python Software Foundation. The application process begins in 2 days from now, and I intend to submit my proposal within the first few days.

If for some reason, you wish to contact me, message me on Telegram or Keybase chat, or you can find me on Twitter, even though I rarely use it.

That’s all for now, but I hope to post again soon.

:wq
